cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with trypsin solved in 20 mM Ambic
instrument: directly connected to an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
ionization type: matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization ions (MALDI) MSI protocol
labeling: For quantification iBAQ-values and a label free quantification approach based on the MaxLFQ algorithm was applied.
